title: The WE Times Spreads the News
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on the we times spreads the news within the The WE Times and the Charlotte Family storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: I the Yonkou ship with Sanji Onboard plows the waves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYORORO! There's this comic strip that runs in the we times*,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's got giant, fantastical robots in it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Sora, warrior of the sea." I've been reading it for as long as I can remember.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: sora, who can walk on the water of the ocean,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Along with a transforming robot and his pet seagull- rerorero,

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Fight the evil armies of the Germa 66!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a tale of safaring Heroes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's popular the world over! NYORORORORORORORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As far as I've heard, it's supposed to be based on the exploits of Marine Heroes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Basically an attempt at brainwashing little kids to idolize the marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You know, make 'em think that the Marines are always fighting for the just cause and that they're the strongest there is... NYORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But none of that stuff caught my fancy.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: I was always drawn to the German myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The evil army that spares no effort in chasing down and trying to defeat SORA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course, they pretty much always end up losing, but... I root for them every time, without fail, all the same! With bated breath!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm ROOTIN' for your team!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't lump me in with those bastards! I don't have anything to do with them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NYORORO... COME ON, DON'T BE LIKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: truth be told, I'm pretty thrilled I got the chance to meet a real one in the flesh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why don't you go seek out the real army then? I'm sure you'll have a blast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MMP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi! Open up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Knock knock

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And so you see...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Quit following me! This is my private room!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: It's my room too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let me outta here, Dammit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why does he get the Prince treatment?! I'm one of the world's fore- most scientists, for crying out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Still Blatherin' on about that like anyone gives a damn...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Ceesar, our orders were to take you prisoner!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But this guy? He's the man...

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: That will bring the Vinsmoke and Charlotte Fami- lies together! The man of the hour!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's worth his weight in gold! NYORORORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't make me repeat myself! I ain't marrying anyone! Now get the hell out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Get the hell out of here"?

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Firetank Pirates killer GOTTI

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Don't tell me this pretty boy just mouthed off to Vito!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He didn't mean it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gotti! Hold your horses, man! Cool it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's all good! He's just doin' a bit of friendly ribbing! We're just havin' a laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No one's laughing here. Get the hell out. The both of you.

summary: The WE Times Spreads the News: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
